findings.topic: release replay through mutable queue rewind
findings.action: Added an atomic one-use release claim outside the mutable queue in owner-only shared Git state, plus a replay test and an explicit same-user trust-boundary statement.

findings.topic: null worker ledger and unreserved budget identifier
findings.action: Confirmed that a null assertion resolves to the repository-wide ledger and that worker reservation consumes request id, nonce, budget id, window and daily budgets before Claude. The controller now passes the exact shared ledger path and an integration test exercises the real admission path.
Restricted Reviewer targets to agent/, claude/ and codex/ feature-branch families.
Changed OpenSSL signing to anonymous inherited file descriptors so no named private-key copy is created.
Added final size identity and direct bounded-read length enforcement.
